heading: Pin the FCV (Feature Compatibility Version) for Your Cluster
body:
When your cluster has a pinned FCV (Feature Compatibility Version), a pin icon appears next to your cluster's **Version**
at the bottom of the cluster card. If you hover your cursor over the pin icon, a tooltip that
shows the FCV (Feature Compatibility Version) and the expiration date appears.Atlas unpins your cluster's FCV (Feature Compatibility Version) on the next [Configure Maintenance Window](configure-maintenance-window)
starting on or after the expiration date.If you already upgraded your cluster's MongoDB version, Atlas upgrades its FCV (Feature Compatibility Version) to match
its MongoDB version after the pin expires.To pin the FCV (Feature Compatibility Version) for your cluster:**Ui:**Atlas UI
